Featuring a wide garden with swimming pool, La Cantina Relais offers rooms with Wi-Fi in Rigutino. This country house produces organic products including Vin Santo wine, olive oil, honey and jams.
Set in the same stone building as the original wine cellar, the air-conditioned rooms are in rustic style, with terracotta floors and wooden furnishings. They feature a flat-screen TV and private bathroom with bath or shower and hairdryer.

La Cantina Relais - Fattoria Il Cipresso is 15 km from Arezzo and 18 km from Cortona. Lake Trasimeno is a 30-minute drive away.
